arts.ttl: Sevilla 0–2 Real Madrid: Player Ratings As Kylian Mbappe Continues Historic Debut Season
arts.sum: Goals from Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham secured the 2–0 victory for Real Madrid against a Sevilla side down to nine men.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury crisis worsens as 22-year-old 'very likely' to miss Sevilla showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid are hit with another defensive injury blow ahead of Sunday's La Liga showdown with Sevilla, as a new player drops out of training with a muscle problem.
